items.title: Recipe Ops Incident Stabilization Sprint
items.description: A focused KTLO initiative to reduce critical production defects, tighten incident response loops, and remove the highest-severity reliability failures affecting Nutrition operations.

items.title: Compliance Workflow Debt Retirement
items.description: A KTLO initiative to reduce operational drag by refactoring brittle integrations, simplifying recovery paths, and removing legacy technical debt that slows change in Nutrition.

items.title: Nutrition Stack Patch Compliance Cycle
items.description: A KTLO initiative to keep the Nutrition stack within security patch SLAs by upgrading vulnerable dependencies, rotating outdated components, and closing remediation gaps.
